TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: izua sitsuayan i pasazayazaya tua tapaw ni Luvutsi a tapaw ni Savaɫi a Pasusu katua kina.
S.PHON: izua siʦuajan i pasazajazaja tua tapaw ni ɭuvuʦi a tapaw ni savaʎi a pasusu katua kina.
S.FORM: izua sicuayan i pasazayazaya tua tapaw ni Luvuci a tapaw ni Savalji a Pasusu katua kina.
S.PHON: izua siʦuajan i pasazajazaja tua tapaw ni ɣuvuʦi a tapaw ni savaʎi a pasusu katua kina.
S.TRANSL: Once upon a time above the Luvutsi house was the house of Savaɫi Pasusu and her mother.

S.FORM: sa ti Savaɫi "muri vaik aken a sema tjatjan, kina.
S.PHON: sa ti savaʎi "muri vaik akən a səma cacan, kina.
S.FORM: sa ti Savalji "muri vaik aken a sema tjatjan, kina.
S.PHON: sa ti savaʎi "muRi vaik akən a səma ʦaʦan, kina.
S.TRANSL: Savaɫi said: “I’m going to the spring, mother.

S.FORM: ɫakua maya semutsaqev a ku tjaɫev," aya ti Savaɫi; sa vaik a sema tjatjan.
S.PHON: ʎakua maja səmuʦaqəv a ku caʎəv," aja ti savaʎi; sa vaik a səma cacan.
S.FORM: ljakua maya semucaqev a ku tjaljev," aya ti Savalji; sa vaik a sema tjatjan.
S.PHON: ʎakua maja səmuʦaqəv a ku ʦaʎəv," aja ti savaʎi; sa vaik a səma ʦaʦan.
S.TRANSL: But don’t take the lid off my box,” said Savaɫi, and went off to the spring.

S.FORM: manu "anema siayaya nua ku aɫak?
S.PHON: manu "anəma siajaja nua ku aʎak
S.FORM: manu "anema siayaya nua ku aljak?
S.PHON: manu "anəma siajaja nua ku aʎak
S.TRANSL: “What is my child talking about?

S.FORM: ku qayamaw," aya azua kina, sa sutsaqevi a tjaɫev.
S.PHON: ku qajamaw," aja azua kina, sa suʦaqəvi a caʎəv.
S.FORM: ku qayamaw," aya azua kina, sa sucaqevi a tjaljev.
S.PHON: ku qajamaw," aja azua kina, sa suʦaqəvi a ʦaʎəv.
S.TRANSL: I’ll have a look,” said her mother; and she took the lid off the box.

S.FORM: manu minvar a aɫak nua qatjuvi sema tu nazuazuanga.
S.PHON: manu minvar a aʎak nua qacuvi səma tu nazuazuaŋa.
S.FORM: manu minvar a aljak nua qatjuvi sema tu nazuazuanga.
S.PHON: manu minvaR a aʎak nua qaʦuvi səma tu nazuazuaŋa.
S.TRANSL: Then young snakes scattered everywhere.

S.FORM: azua ti Savaɫi a muri tsemikel a kasi tjatjan, metsevung katu aɫak nua qatjuvi.
S.PHON: azua ti savaʎi a muri ʦəmikəɭ a kasi cacan, məʦəvuŋ katu aʎak nua qacuvi.
S.FORM: azua ti Savalji a muri cemikel a kasi tjatjan, mecevung katu aljak nua qatjuvi.
S.PHON: azua ti savaʎi a muRi ʦəmikəɣ a kasi ʦaʦan, məʦəvuŋ katu aʎak nua qaʦuvi.
S.TRANSL: Savaɫi was going to come back from the spring, and met a young snake.

S.FORM: "aa masa sinutsaqevan anga ni kina," aya.
S.PHON: "aa masa sinuʦaqəvan aŋa ni kina," aja.
S.FORM: "aa masa sinucaqevan anga ni kina," aya.
S.PHON: "aa masa sinuʦaqəvan aŋa ni kina," aja.
S.TRANSL: “Ah, that’s because mother has taken the lid off,” she thought.

S.FORM: sa djemaɫun i tapaw sa kiqenetjan a tjaɫev; nekanga a aɫak.
S.PHON: sa ɉəmaʎun i tapaw sa kiqənəcan a caʎəv; nəkaŋa a aʎak.
S.FORM: sa djemaljun i tapaw sa kiqenetjan a tjaljev; nekanga a aljak.
S.PHON: sa ɉəmaʎun i tapaw sa kiqənəʦan a ʦaʎəv; nəkaŋa a aʎak.
S.TRANSL: She reached the house and looked at the box. There were no young snakes.

S.FORM: qau matjalaw ti Savaɫi.
S.PHON: qau macaɭaw ti savaʎi.
S.FORM: qau matjalaw ti Savalji.
S.PHON: qau maʦaɣaw ti savaʎi.
S.TRANSL: Savaɫi was angry.

S.FORM: "aku su ayain a ku aɫak?
S.PHON: "aku su ajain a ku aʎak
S.FORM: "aku su ayain a ku aljak?
S.PHON: "aku su ajain a ku aʎak
S.TRANSL: “Why did you do that to my children?

S.FORM: muri vaik anga ken a djemavats," aya ti Savaɫi.
S.PHON: muri vaik aŋa kən a ɉəmavaʦ," aja ti savaʎi.
S.FORM: muri vaik anga ken a djemavac," aya ti Savalji.
S.PHON: muRi vaik aŋa kən a ɉəmavaʦ," aja ti savaʎi.
S.TRANSL: I’m going to walk away,” said Savaɫi.

S.FORM: sa mirava tua nanemanemanga, sa kemuidi, sa vaik a sema katsedas.
S.PHON: sa mirava tua nanəmanəmaŋa, sa kəmuidi, sa vaik a səma kaʦədas.
S.FORM: sa mirava tua nanemanemanga, sa kemuidi, sa vaik a sema kacedas.
S.PHON: sa miRava tua nanəmanəmaŋa, sa kəmuidi, sa vaik a səma kaʦədas.
S.TRANSL: And she packed up everything, and put on a bamboo hat, and went off to the east.

S.FORM: a kina "maya vaik, maya vaik," aya.
S.PHON: a kina "maja vaik, maja vaik," aja.
S.FORM: a kina "maya vaik, maya vaik," aya.
S.PHON: a kina "maja vaik, maja vaik," aja.
S.TRANSL: Her mother said: “Don’t go, don’t go!”

S.FORM: vaik a kitjaviliɫ a kina, aya.
S.PHON: vaik a kicaviɭiʎ a kina, aja.
S.FORM: vaik a kitjavililj a kina, aya.
S.PHON: vaik a kiʦaviɣiʎ a kina, aja.
S.TRANSL: And her mother followed behind her, they say.

S.FORM: qau djemaɫun i ɫavek, sa vaik i taladj tua ɫavek.
S.PHON: qau ɉəmaʎun i ʎavək, sa vaik i taɭaɉ tua ʎavək.
S.FORM: qau djemaljun i ljavek, sa vaik i taladj tua ljavek.
S.PHON: qau ɉəmaʎun i ʎavək, sa vaik i taɣaɉ tua ʎavək.
S.TRANSL: She came to the sea, and went into the sea.

S.FORM: qau maqelidi maqelidi a kuidi.
S.PHON: qau maqəɭidi maqəɭidi a kuidi.
S.FORM: qau maqelidi maqelidi a kuidi.
S.PHON: qau maqəɣidi maqəɣidi a kuidi.
S.TRANSL: Her hat floated round and round,

S.FORM: qau maulaw.
S.PHON: qau mauɭaw.
S.FORM: qau maulaw.
S.PHON: qau mauɣaw.
S.TRANSL: and it disappeared.

S.FORM: qau mavan anga nu siaya Tjisavaɫi, aya tjautsikel a sitsuayan.
S.PHON: qau mavan aŋa nu siaja cisavaʎi, aja cauʦikəɭ a siʦuajan.
S.FORM: qau mavan anga nu siaya Tjisavalji, aya tjaucikel a sicuayan.
S.PHON: qau mavan aŋa nu siaja ʦisavaʎi, aja ʦauʦikəɣ a siʦuajan.
S.TRANSL: And that’s why the place is called Tjisavaɫi, according to the old story.

S.FORM: azua ti Savaɫi namavunglay tua valaɫvaɫ kasi ɫavek.
S.PHON: azua ti savaʎi namavuŋɭaj tua vaɭaʎvaʎ kasi ʎavək.
S.FORM: azua ti Savalji namavunglay tua valaljvalj kasi ljavek.
S.PHON: azua ti savaʎi namavuŋɣaj tua vaɣaʎvaʎ kasi ʎavək.
S.TRANSL: Savaɫi had become pregnant by the monster from the sea.

S.FORM: saka masa navaik a tsemikel a sema ɫavek itjua
S.PHON: saka masa navaik a ʦəmikəɭ a səma ʎavək icua
S.FORM: saka masa navaik a cemikel a sema ljavek itjua
S.PHON: saka masa navaik a ʦəmikəɣ a səma ʎavək iʦua
S.TRANSL: valaɫvaɫ.
